nameMeanings.name: Poges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Inge, Kurt.  Jewish Hillel, Mayer, Meir, Mendel.
Jewish (Ashkenazic from central Europe): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Porye, a derivative of the Biblical Zipporah, + the Yiddish or German possessive suffix -s.
